title: Beware of Investment Scam
summary: DoT/Sanchar Saathi awareness advisory: Beware of Investment Scam. Categories of suspected fraud reportable via Chakshu include: Impersonation as Police/CBI/Customs/Aadhaar/RBI, KYC and Payment fraud, Online job/gift/lottery/loan offers, and more. Visit Sanchar Saathi portal (sancharsaathi.gov.in), use Chakshu facility to report suspected fraud communication. Call 1930 for financial fraud. Report at cybercrime.gov.in.
red_flags: Caller claims to be from Police / CBI / Customs / UIDAI / RBI
Asks for OTP, Aadhaar details, or bank account information
Offers online job or prize that requires advance payment
Undeliverable parcel requiring customs duty payment
Unsolicited loan offer via SMS or WhatsApp
raw_text: Beware of Investment Scam. This advisory is published by the Department of Telecommunications via the Sanchar Saathi portal. Categories of fraud communication reportable via Chakshu: impersonation calls, KYC/payment fraud, job/lottery offers. Impersonation as Police, CBI, Customs, Aadhaar, RBI etc. Impersonation as a relative / friend. KYC and Payment related to Bank / Electricity / Gas / Insurance etc. Fake Customer Care Helpline. Online job/ gift/ lottery / loans offers. IVR / Robo Calls. Sextortion. Suspected link/ website. Any Other Suspected Fraud . Suspected fraud communication received through which medium can be reported at Chakshu facility on Sanchar Saathi? Voice call, SMS, WhatsApp message or WhatsApp call where the sender’s mobile / landline number is visible. How suspected fraud communications can be reported on Chakshu facility of Sanchar Saathi? Following steps are to be taken: Visit Sanchar Saathi portal at www.sancharsaathi.gov.in Click Citizen Centric Services and then click on 'Chakshu - Report Suspected Fraud Communication'. Select the medium and category of suspected fraud communication. Provide the details of suspected fraud communication. Screenshot of the communication received may also be uploaded which is optional. Verify your mobile number with OTP and enter your name. Click submit button to submit the request. Alternatively, Citizens can download mobile App from Google Play Store and Apple App Store. What happens to such suspected fraud communication reported at 'Chakshu' on Sanchar Saathi? Department of Telecommunications, after verification of the reported event, KYC and Payment related to Bank / Electricity / Gas / Insurance etc. Fake Customer Care Helpline. Online job/ gift/ lottery / loans offers. IVR / Robo Calls. Sextortion. Suspected link/ website. Any Other Suspected Fraud . Suspected fraud communication received through which medium can be reported at Chakshu facility on Sanchar Saathi? Voice call, SMS, WhatsApp message or WhatsApp call where the sender’s mobile / landline number is visible. How suspected fraud communications can be reported on Chakshu facility of Sanchar Saathi? Following steps are to be taken: Visit Sanchar Saathi portal at www.sancharsaathi.gov.in Click Citizen Centric Services and then click on 'Chakshu - Report Suspected Fraud Communication'. Select the medium and category of suspected fraud communication. Provide the details of suspected fraud communication. Screenshot of the communication received may also be uploaded which is optional. Verify your mobile number with OTP and enter your name. Click submit button to submit the request. Alternatively, Citizens can download mobile App from Google Play Store and Apple App Store. What happens to such suspected fraud communication reported at 'Chakshu' on Sanchar Saathi? Department of Telecommunications, after verification of the reported event, Online job/ gift/ lottery / loans offers. IVR / Robo Calls. Sextortion. Suspected link/ website. A
